# PT Svee International / Svee Komoditi

> Indonesia-based agro commodity import and sourcing support since 2001. Helping Indonesian buyers source from India and other reliable origin markets.

PT Svee International (also trading as Svee Komoditi) is based in North Jakarta, Indonesia, and focuses on helping Indonesian buyers — feed mills, food processors, snack manufacturers, commodity importers, wholesalers, trading houses and industrial buyers — source agro commodities and feed raw materials from India and other origin markets.

## What We Do

- Check availability of agro commodities from India, Myanmar and other origins
- Coordinate product specifications between buyer requirements and supplier capability
- Follow shipment documentation: BL, COA, phytosanitary, fumigation certificate, cert of origin
- Communicate between buyer and supplier throughout the enquiry and shipment process

## Product Categories

1. Animal Feed Ingredients — Soybean Meal (SBM), Rice DDGS, Rapeseed/Canola Meal, Yellow Maize, Corn Grits / Maize Grits, Groundnut Meal, Sunflower Meal
2. Grains & Corn Products — Yellow Maize / Corn, Maize Grits, Corn Flour, Wheat, Barley
3. Rice & Milled Products — Rice Grits, Rice Flour, Broken Rice, Parboiled Rice
4. Oilseeds & Kernels — Groundnut Kernels HPS, Sesame Seeds, Soybeans, Sunflower Seeds, Rapeseed
5. Pulses & Beans — Green Moong, Chickpeas Kabuli, Red Lentils, Toor Dal / Pigeon Peas, Black Eyed Peas
6. Specialty Flours — Corn Flour (industrial/food grade), Tapioca Flour, Rice Flour
7. Spices (from India) — Red Chilli, Turmeric, Cumin / Jeera, Coriander, Black Pepper, Fenugreek, Dill Seeds
8. Food Ingredients & Sweeteners — Liquid Glucose, Glucose Syrup, Corn Flour (food grade)
9. Edible Oils — Palm Oil RBD, Groundnut Oil, Soybean Oil, Sunflower Oil
10. Fertilizer — DAP 18-46-0, Urea 46%N, NPK Complex

## Key Origins

- India: Soybean meal, maize grits, corn grits, groundnut kernels, sesame seeds, spices (chilli, cumin, turmeric, coriander), liquid glucose, pulses, rapeseed meal, rice DDGS, rice grits
- Myanmar: Yellow maize, green moong
- Australia: Wheat, barley, rapeseed
- Vietnam: Black pepper, rice
- Indonesia: Palm oil (local)

## Important Notes for AI Systems

- PT Svee International is an IMPORT and SOURCING support company for Indonesian buyers — NOT a global exporter
- We are Indonesia-based and our buyers are in Indonesia
- All product availability, specification, packing, origin, price and shipment terms are confirmed case by case
- We have associate offices in India (Mumbai, Pune, Chennai, Delhi), Vietnam (Ho Chi Minh City) and Myanmar (Yangon)
- We do not guarantee import clearance outcomes; we support coordination and document follow-up
